descriptions.description:
The screen shows a Miro online whiteboard application with a dark grid background.

**Visual output:**
Large green text is centered on the canvas, reading:
"Data"
"CSV/TSV – Comma/Tab Separated Values"
"JSON - JavaScript Object Notation"

**UI state:**
The application is Miro, as indicated by the logo in the top left and the toolbar on the left side. The browser shows several open tabs, including "p5.js Web Editor" and "Data - Miro." The browser interface shows a system time of 5:30 PM in the top right corner.
